steps.title: Find the slope of h
steps.content:
Line $h$ contains $(18{,}130)$, $(23{,}160)$, and $(26{,}178)$. Use two points to find the slope.
$$
\frac{160-130}{23-18}=\frac{30}{5}=6
$$

steps.title: Write the shifted line
steps.content:
Use $y=mx+b$ with slope $6$ and point $(18{,}130)$.
$$
130=6(18)+b
$$
$$
b=22
$$
So line $h$ is $y=6x+22$. Translating down $5$ units gives
$$
y=6x+17
$$

steps.title: Find the intercept
steps.content: At the $x$-intercept, $y=0$. $$ 0=6x+17 $$ $$ x=-\frac{17}{6} $$ So the intercept is $$ (-\frac{17}{6},0) $$ The answer is D.
